title: Richly Roasted Peruvian Turkey Mince Papa Rellena
description: A jammy, gooey, cozy Peruvian dish featuring turkey mince, shio-cure, in a papa rellena form, halal-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Boil the potatoes until they are tender, then mash and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion until softened.
Add the garlic and aji amarillo pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turkey mince to the pan, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until it is no longer pink.
Stir in the shio cure, salt, and black pepper.
Combine the cooked turkey mince mixture with the mashed potatoes and mix well.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a patty shape and make a well in the center of each patty.
Place a spoonful of the turkey mince mixture into the well of each patty, then fold the patty over to enclose the filling and shape into a papa rellena form.
Brush the tops of the papa rellenas with the beaten egg and bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
